programme.title: Orangutangenes jungelskole
programme.desc: Besøk to alvorlig syke orangutanger på klinikken. Eriks infeksjon i hodet er bekymringsverdig, og 14 år gamle Mia er avhengig av en blodoverføring for å overleve. Utenfor klinikken finner smårollingene en hemmelig godbit gjemt inni et gummitre.

programme.title: Monsunens øy
programme.desc: Lavlandet i Sri Lanka har tusenvis av tilsynelatende fredfylte innsjøer. Men ikke la deg lure. Dette er riket til sumpkrokodillene. Krokodillene er jegere fra første stund. Se hvordan disse rovdyrene konkurrerer mot hverandre i den brennende heten.

programme.title: Bestevennen min er et dyr
programme.desc: Bli kjent med den myke siden til pungdjevelen, møt en banebrytende havskilpadde og nyt en familiemiddag sammen med rådyret Buttons. Spill fotball med den 800 kilo tunge oksen Spud, og se hvordan uglen Digger hjalp naturverneren Nigel gjennom kreftbehandlingen hans.

programme.title: Bestevennen min er et dyr
programme.desc: Møt storflaggermusen Banksi og hans menneskelige surrogatmor, se en ertelysten emu og feir årsdagen for da en gris ble reddet. Bli med til manathimmelen og lær å snakke baviansk med Dingani, som har et unikt forhold til apevennen sin, Lucy.

programme.title: På jakt etter regnet
programme.desc: Følg Anastasia når flokken hennes deler seg for å beskytte to dyrebare elefantunger. Geparden Kuleta tar tilbake territorium til ungene hun har igjen. Villhunden Phoenix leter etter en ny make mens himmelens sluser åpner seg og regnet begynner å lege den knusktørre jorden.

programme.title: Hemmelighetene i det magiske vannet
programme.desc: Avdekk dem sære skjønnheten til sumpene, som har inspirert folketro i århundrer, og vært en vital forbindelse mellom liv og død. Svøm med sultne krokodiller, se rådyr sette livet på spill for mat og se kjøttetende planter fange bytter.

programme.title: Hemmelighetene i det magiske vannet
programme.desc: Frys tiden når vann blir en kilde til endring i Jordens kaldeste økosystemer. Jakt på intetanende seler med isbjørnene, bad i naturlige varme kilder med makakene, og prøv en unik overlevelsesstrategi med polarrevene.

programme.title: Vulkanske reiser
programme.desc: Danakilfordypningen i Etiopia er ikke bare et av verdens mest ugjestmilde steder, men også et av de mest geologisk aktive. Nå tar vulkanologen Tom Pfeiffer en gruppe opplevelsesturister med for å krysse Danakil for å se vulkanen Erte Ale.

programme.title: Afrikas skjulte riker
programme.desc: Denne lille parken utgjør en stor forskjell for utrydningstruede dyr, og er et tilfluktssted for noen av de største og minste dyrene i verden. Se hvordan arter på randen av utryddelse tar tilbake sin plass i Afrikas villmark.

programme.title: Havparker
programme.desc: Bli med dypt ned i det sørlige Karibiske hav og utforsk de vernede havområdene i Bonaire nasjonale marinepark. Her finner vi vakre korallrev, utrydningstruede havskilpadder, ville mangroveskoger og myriader av marine arter.

programme.title: Havparker
programme.desc: Denne episoden ser nærmere på tre viktige marine habitater i Florida Keyes, samt dyrene som lever der, og naturvernernes innsats for å beskytte dem.

programme.title: Havparker
programme.desc: Monterey Bay National Marine Sanctuary på vestkysten av USA er landets største havreservat. Her finnes det 525 fiskearter og en enorm undersjøisk tareskog.

programme.title: Kenguruenes hemmelige liv
programme.desc: Grå kjempekenguru er en sosial art som samler seg i små grupper. En slik gruppe er et sosialt nettverk sentrert rundt mat, der medlemmene kommer og går som de vil, avhengig av tilgangen på mat.

programme.title: Kenguruenes hemmelige liv
programme.desc: Grå kjempekenguruer er får mange unger, men det byr på mange utfordringer å oppfostre dem. Rovdyr, ekstremvær og viltre unger gjør at kengurumødre må kjempe hver dag for å holde ungene i live.

programme.title: Kenguruenes hemmelige liv
programme.desc: Følg flere hanner som streifer rundt, klatrer på den sosiale rangstigen og slåss om paringsretter i kengurukolonien. For disse hannene betyr ønsket om å videreføre arten et liv fylt med farer og belønninger.

programme.title: Orangutangenes jungelskole
programme.desc: Det blir store forandringer når fire søte, nye elever starter i barnehagen, og en håndfull tenåringsgutter som har blitt for store og uregjerlige for barnevaktene, har sin siste dag på skogsskolen.

programme.title: Orangutangenes jungelskole
programme.desc: Bli med på kaste-frukt-fest for å feire at Jelapat, Talaken, Bawan og Rona er tilbake i barnehagen sammen med resten av klassekameratene sine. Øyene der apene er før de skal slippes fri, blir oversvømt. Framgangen til to elever stopper opp på grunn av skader.

programme.title: Orangutangenes jungelskole
programme.desc: Opplev en milepæl når to elever får være i skogen for første gang på mange år. Beni og Lala må bli værende på skolens klinikk etter å ha brukket henholdsvis beinet og albuen under et uhell i skogen.

programme.title: Orangutangenes jungelskole
programme.desc: Beni og Lala holder på å bli sprø på klinikken, men de må bli friske før de kan dra tilbake til den viltre klassen sin. På skogsskolen inspirerer en leksjon i termittsanking Valentino til å gjøre en smakfull oppdagelse.

programme.title: Orangutangenes jungelskole
programme.desc: Besøk to alvorlig syke orangutanger på klinikken. Eriks infeksjon i hodet er bekymringsverdig, og 14 år gamle Mia er avhengig av en blodoverføring for å overleve. Utenfor klinikken finner smårollingene en hemmelig godbit gjemt inni et gummitre.

programme.title: Gladiatorer
programme.desc: Tørketiden strammer grepet rundt et lite vannhull på den store savannen i det sørlige Afrika. Her kommer en gruppe gladiatorer, både store og små, farlig nært hverandre.

programme.title: Gladiatorer
programme.desc: Australia er et landområde som har drevet rundt siden dinosaurenes tid. Landet har vært isolert i millioner av år, og evolusjonen har gjort dyrene til de mest imponerende gladiatorene på jorden.

programme.title: Gladiatorer
programme.desc: Hei fram unge gladiatorer som må vise hva de kan i de tette tropiske skogene i Nord- og Sør-Amerika. Hold avstand når en pilgiftfrosk iverksetter et giftig bombardement, overvær en feide om territorium mellom en jaguar og en kaiman, og se en sulten nesebjørn støte på en defensiv tarantell.

programme.title: Gladiatorer
programme.desc: Bli med til det høye nord i Nord-Amerika og møt de ultimate krigerne som lever langs vannveiene her. Se når vårsmeltingen starter konkurransen og setter ørner opp mot hegrer, bjørner opp mot bjørner og libeller opp mot giftige kjempevannteger.

programme.title: Haiplaneten
programme.desc: Haiene har lært seg å utnytte enhver mulighet til å skaffe seg mat, med alt fra luftakrobatikk til kamuflasje og bakholdsangrep. Hvorfor har disse rovdyrene øverst på næringskjeden klart seg så bra?

programme.title: Haiplaneten
programme.desc: Haiene er eldre enn dinosaurene og har streifet omkring i havene våre i over 400 millioner år, men det er først i dag at forskerne begynner å forstå hvorfor de har klart seg så godt.

programme.title: Haiplaneten
programme.desc: Haiene er eldre enn dinosaurene og har utviklet seg slik at de kan leve og trives under de tøffeste forhold. Først nå begynner vi å se hvor oppfinnsomme de faktisk er.

programme.title: Gladiatorer
programme.desc: Tørketiden strammer grepet rundt et lite vannhull på den store savannen i det sørlige Afrika. Her kommer en gruppe gladiatorer, både store og små, farlig nært hverandre.

programme.title: Gladiatorer
programme.desc: Australia er et landområde som har drevet rundt siden dinosaurenes tid. Landet har vært isolert i millioner av år, og evolusjonen har gjort dyrene til de mest imponerende gladiatorene på jorden.

programme.title: Gladiatorer
programme.desc: Hei fram unge gladiatorer som må vise hva de kan i de tette tropiske skogene i Nord- og Sør-Amerika. Hold avstand når en pilgiftfrosk iverksetter et giftig bombardement, overvær en feide om territorium mellom en jaguar og en kaiman, og se en sulten nesebjørn støte på en defensiv tarantell.

programme.title: Gladiatorer
programme.desc: Bli med til det høye nord i Nord-Amerika og møt de ultimate krigerne som lever langs vannveiene her. Se når vårsmeltingen starter konkurransen og setter ørner opp mot hegrer, bjørner opp mot bjørner og libeller opp mot giftige kjempevannteger.

programme.title: Haiplaneten
programme.desc: Haiene har lært seg å utnytte enhver mulighet til å skaffe seg mat, med alt fra luftakrobatikk til kamuflasje og bakholdsangrep. Hvorfor har disse rovdyrene øverst på næringskjeden klart seg så bra?

programme.title: Haiplaneten
programme.desc: Haiene er eldre enn dinosaurene og har streifet omkring i havene våre i over 400 millioner år, men det er først i dag at forskerne begynner å forstå hvorfor de har klart seg så godt.

programme.title: Haiplaneten
programme.desc: Haiene er eldre enn dinosaurene og har utviklet seg slik at de kan leve og trives under de tøffeste forhold. Først nå begynner vi å se hvor oppfinnsomme de faktisk er.

programme.title: Vulkanske reiser
programme.desc: For vulkanologen Tom Pfeiffer er all vulkansk aktivitet i Indonesia av interesse på grunn av landets beliggenhet i forhold til det største utbruddet i moderne historie – Krakatoa. Nå ser det ut til at Anak, sønn av Krakatoa, beveger seg inn i en mer voldsom fase, så Tom drar til Indonesia for å se om Ildens barn er klar til å gjenta mønsteret til sin forfar.

programme.title: En bies dagbok
programme.desc: I en bikube jobber titusenvis av små dyr sammen mot et felles mål: koloniens overlevelse. Men hvordan er livet for en enkelt honningbie? En bies dagbok forteller deg den historien.

programme.title: Inn I det ville Colombia
programme.desc: En ung kapusinerape som vokser opp midt i hjertet av Colombias regnskog må lære å klarte, hvordan man finner mat og hvordan man kan skille mellom venn og fiende.

programme.title: Inn I det ville Colombia
programme.desc: Fra Colombias høysletter ved Páramo til de tropiske regnskogene, har kolibriene utviklet seg til et utrolig antall ulike arter. Om de kjemper mot iskaldt regn eller jungelens rovdyr, må hver mor jobbe for å bygge et rede og beskytte eggene sine.

programme.title: Inn I det ville Colombia
programme.desc: De flate savannene ved Llanos i Colombia styres av ekstreme sesonger som presser livet til det ytterste. På denne utilgivende arenaen finnes det ikke nye sjanser, og kun de skapningene som er best tilpasset de brutale forholdene klarer å overleve.

programme.title: Inn I det ville Colombia
programme.desc: Mona, en bomullstopptamarin er helt alene i sitt hjem i den tropiske regnskogen. Hun har forlatt den trygge fødefamilien sin for å finne en annen flokk der hun forhåpentligvis kan finne seg en make.

programme.title: Inn I det ville Colombia
programme.desc: Dette er historien om Julieta, en gyllen pilgiftfrosk-hunn på jakt etter sin Romeo. Hun skal snart legge egg, og må finne en hann for å befrukte dem. Romeos kall guider henne gjennom skogen, men å komme seg gjennom den tykke regnskogen er ikke lett.

programme.title: Pridelands: Villmarken kommer tilbake
programme.desc: En familie fra Australia legger ut på eventyr for å sette i stand en gammel jaktgård i Sør-Afrika. Målet er å bygge opp igjen det overgrodde habitatet, skape en gård basert på økoturisme og la den naturlige villmarken, inklusive rovdyr, komme tilbake.

programme.title: Nykommere i villmarken
programme.desc: Sett kursen mot eventyr med Thiago, en modig nesebjørn. Finn ut hvordan denne vaskebjørn-lignende karen skjerper sine snuse- og leteferdigheter, krysser forstadsveier i nærheten av sitt frodige brasilianske skoghjem og unngår livløse og firbeinte farer.

programme.title: Nykommere i villmarken
programme.desc: Besøk den siste høyborgen til den gigantiske elveoteren i Brasils vakre Pantanal-våtmark. Spor valpen Rio og søsknene hans mens de tester vannet, slår seg sammen for å unngå et angrep fra jaguarer og bli en familieenhet som jakter og vokser sammen.

programme.title: Monsunens øy
programme.desc: De skyggefulle skogene i Yala nasjonalpark er det perfekte gjemmestedet for hemmelighetsfulle leoparder. Det er tid for den unge hunnen, Asha, å sette avgårde alene. Bli med når hun kjemper for sitt eget territorium, finner en make og blir mor.

programme.title: Monsunens øy
programme.desc: Elefantungen Loka lærer seg viktig livslærdom blant kjempene, mens familien passer godt på ham.

programme.title: Monsunens øy
programme.desc: Lavlandet i Sri Lanka har tusenvis av tilsynelatende fredfylte innsjøer. Men ikke la deg lure. Dette er riket til sumpkrokodillene. Krokodillene er jegere fra første stund. Se hvordan disse rovdyrene konkurrerer mot hverandre i den brennende heten.

programme.title: Havets festmåltid
programme.desc: Få et innblikk i verdens største biomassevandring, den årlige, 1600 kilometer lange sardinvandringen langs østkysten av Sør-Afrika. Se milliarder av disse bittesmå fiskene svømme slalåm mellom sultne rovdyr som listige seler og stupende havsuler.

programme.title: På dypt vann i Australia
programme.desc: Utforsk kysten av Northern Territory og det rikholdige Great Barrier Reef sammen med biolog Lizzie Daly når hun undersøker hvorfor så mange merkelige og livsfarlige skapninger har slått seg ned her.

programme.title: På dypt vann i Australia
programme.desc: Si farvel til tropene og bli med til det kjølige vannet på sørkysten. Bli kjent med majestetiske sandtigerhaier, sepiablekkspruter som kan skifte form, og enorme blåhvaler. Se pingviner og sjøløver leke, og finn ut hvorfor dette farvannet yrer av liv.

programme.title: På dypt vann i Australia
programme.desc: Vi reiser til villmarken der Australias innlandsørken møter det varme, ugjestmilde Indiahavet. Biolog Lizzie Daly dykker sammen med tigerhaier, djevelskater og nomadiske skilpadder.

programme.title: Irlands ville øyer med Eoin Warner
programme.desc: Vi starter på Rathlin, der lomviunger som ikke kan fly ennå, tar sjansen på å hoppe, og gylne harer ønsker daggryet velkommen. Deretter drar vi til Tory for å se brugder, delfiner og kjærlighetsdansen til den utrydningstruede åkerriksen. Til slutt følger vi søte røyskatter på Achill.

programme.title: Irlands ville øyer med Eoin Warner
programme.desc: Eoin Warner fortsetter reisen sørover fra County Mayo til County Clare. Underveis får han se de utrolige kampene mellom gråseler med barn på Inishkeaøyene.

programme.title: Irlands ville øyer med Eoin Warner
programme.desc: Se hvordan rødnebbterner klarer å pendle over 80 000 kilometer i året for å tilbringe sommeren på Mahareeøyene i Kerry. Dra på hvalsafari utenfor Brandon Head, og se Irlands største dyreskue: en koloni med 1000 gråseler på Great Blasket Island.

programme.title: Havets festmåltid
programme.desc: Få et innblikk i verdens største biomassevandring, den årlige, 1600 kilometer lange sardinvandringen langs østkysten av Sør-Afrika. Se milliarder av disse bittesmå fiskene svømme slalåm mellom sultne rovdyr som listige seler og stupende havsuler.

programme.title: På dypt vann i Australia
programme.desc: Utforsk kysten av Northern Territory og det rikholdige Great Barrier Reef sammen med biolog Lizzie Daly når hun undersøker hvorfor så mange merkelige og livsfarlige skapninger har slått seg ned her.

programme.title: På dypt vann i Australia
programme.desc: Si farvel til tropene og bli med til det kjølige vannet på sørkysten. Bli kjent med majestetiske sandtigerhaier, sepiablekkspruter som kan skifte form, og enorme blåhvaler. Se pingviner og sjøløver leke, og finn ut hvorfor dette farvannet yrer av liv.

programme.title: På dypt vann i Australia
programme.desc: Vi reiser til villmarken der Australias innlandsørken møter det varme, ugjestmilde Indiahavet. Biolog Lizzie Daly dykker sammen med tigerhaier, djevelskater og nomadiske skilpadder.

programme.title: Irlands ville øyer med Eoin Warner
programme.desc: Vi starter på Rathlin, der lomviunger som ikke kan fly ennå, tar sjansen på å hoppe, og gylne harer ønsker daggryet velkommen. Deretter drar vi til Tory for å se brugder, delfiner og kjærlighetsdansen til den utrydningstruede åkerriksen. Til slutt følger vi søte røyskatter på Achill.

programme.title: Andre Midani: An Insiders Story of Brazilian Music
programme.desc: Based on his autobiography, this unique session of intimate conversations reveals the key events in the history of Brazilian music through the eyes of Andre Midani, who helped shape the Brazilian music scene like no other from the 1950s to the new millennium. With Gilberto Gil, Caetano Veloso, Marisa Monte, Chico Buarque, Frejat, Jorge Ben Jor, Erasmo Carlos, Boni, Fernanda Torres, Washington Olivetto, Carlos Lyra, Miúcha, Roberto Menescal, Baby Brazil, Dadi, Liminha, Nelson Motta, Carlos Diegues, Fernanda Montenegro - and many othersSubtitles available for this program with your remote control.

programme.title: Madeleine Peyroux at Bordeauxs Grand-Theâtre
programme.desc: Born in the United States, Madeleine Peyroux is a jazz singer and guitarist with an unclassifiable style and an exceptional artistic personality, carried by a voice that is both soft and husky, with blues and folk accents. After spending part of her childhood in the United States, she moved to France as a teenager where she joined her first jazz bands. An atypical artist, she performs a lot in the street while participating in festivals and creating her own albums. In 2004, she had an international success with Careless Love. Other albums have been released since, including the recent Anthem (2018), the title of which is taken from a Leonard Cohen song.

programme.title: Steinway and Sons
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes at the Steinway and Sons factory and discover Spirio, the incredible technology that allows a piano to replay a performance exactly as it was played live. Mr. Guido Zimmermann, the president of the world-famous pianomakers, talks us through the revolutionary concept, accompanied by images of the precise, fascinating craftmanship and engineering that goes into each one of the Spirio pianos. Hugo Cohen Sprungs documentary also allows us insight into French pianist and Steinway artist Bertrand Chamayous experience with the technology and features a preview of his unique two-piano concert in which he performs with his "shadow"!

programme.title: The Sound Weavers: Ludovico Einaudi, Hauschka, Joep Beving, Hania Rani
programme.desc: Sold-out concerts, millions of albums sold to make the classical music industry green with envy: neoclassical, as the new musical trend is called, is a mega hit. What makes the form so popular? Is this music skillful or just comforting? Are its composers Mozart 2.0 or rather maestros for the masses?

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing’s Zoe Ball and Ian Waite are quickstepping their way across the south West of England in a bid to turn a profit at auction in Hampshire. Experts Margie Cooper and Paul Laidlaw are on hand to guide. Paul shares a secret with Zoe about buying antique hair brushes. Ian, though, offers dancing lessons to dealers to secure a discount. Lordy! Zoe also hears how one village became world famous for lace production while Ian ends up meeting a giant horse with its own boat.

programme.title: We are Artists not Vandals
programme.desc: Follow the artists who dress the streets from the ground to the walls. In each episode, we will introduce you to one or several street artists who will make you discover their passion or their work for some. The street art is an artistic movement and a mode of expression, which asserts itself or claims so from the end of the 20th century. However, some people still find it difficult to consider it as a real art form. We will try to prove them wrong.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Franco-Danish painter, Camille Pissarro. You will discover his labour with View from Louveciennes, A path through the fields, Pontoise or Peasant girl making a fire.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Prussian painter, Caspar David Friedrich. You will discover his labour with The Wanderer above the mists, Greifswald port or the Lone tree.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor and charmer Nigel Havers and his canny, deal-making chum (and ex-agent) Michael Whitehall explore the West Country. Travelling by Bentley and TVR, they’ll have £400 each and expert advice from Margie Cooper and James Braxton. But what will do best at the auction... Nigel’s old cockle bucket or Michael’s tambourine? Plus there’s a trip to see some Bristol Savages and bit of Georgian elegance with the story of ‘The King of Bath’.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Claude Monet est probablement le peintre impressionniste le plus celèbre du mouvement. Le terme « impressionnisme » est notamment derive d’une de ses peintures « Impression, soleil levant » (1872). Cette exposition retrace les grandes etapes de la carrière prolifique de Monet tout en se concentrant sur les tableaux de ce maître de l’art à ne pas manquer comme : « La Gare Saint-Lazare », « Les Coquelicots », « Les Meules », « Serie des Cathedrales de Rouen » expose dans les 4 coins du monde comme au Musee des Beaux-arts de Boston et sans oublier « Les Nympheas » expose au musee de lOrangerie à Paris.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.sub-title: La bande dessinée en trois cases
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Red, art and utopia in the land of the Soviets" at the Grand Palais in Paris. This exhibition focuses on how the communist project generated specific art forms throughout the Soviet period and more precisely from the October Revolution until the death of Stalin in 1953.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Canaletto and the Art of Venice
programme.desc: Canaletto et l’art de Venise, un voyage en immersion dans la vie et l’art du celèbre peintre de Venise. Aucun artiste n’a su mieux capturer l’essence et le charme de cette ville que Giovanni Antonio Canal, plus connu sous le nom de Canaletto. La remarquable collection regroupe plus de 200 tableaux, dessins et eaux-fortes nous permet de partir à la decouverte du talent artistique de Canaletto, de ses contemporains et de la ville qu’il a su reproduire avec genie. Le film ouvre egalement les portes de deux residences royales officielles, Buckingham Palace et le château de Windsor, pour nous en apprendre plus sur l’artiste et sur Joseph Smith, l’homme qui a fait decouvrir Canaletto à la Grande-Bretagne.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: There are few artists who, during their lifetime, prepare the posterity of their work with meticulousness, secrecy and determination. The symbolist painter Gustave Moreau, born in 1826, is one of them. In this museum that he created with his hand, his paintings are available to us, more than a century after his death, and tell us the story of a tormented and enigmatic man, borrowed from a mysticism that will one of the most important painters of the Symbolist movement.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: The Museum of Hunting and Nature in Paris opens the doors of the imagination of our forests, our jungles, our savannah, and offers a very special experience, to the discovery of animals, and of the relationship, sometimes tragic, sometimes sublime, that we have with them. It is an ode to nature, elevated to the rank of art, and to its wild, simple, ferocious beauty.

programme.title: Vasarely, the illusionist
programme.desc: As a visual artist, painter and theorist, Vasarely was determined to challenge the art of the easel and develop an art form that was "in tune with the times" and aimed at the widest possible audience. In his quest for "functional" art, he wanted his new kinetic plastic art to help beautify the city and thereby transform society. Today, he remains the celebrated inventor of Op art.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, well talk with Emmanuel Bastien, photographer and videographer. For the past 20 years, he has shot documentaries, commercials, fashion and news for major networks. During his lifetime, he has witnessed political instability and poverty in India, Cambodia and Mali, which has led him to focus on social issues and personal struggles.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will meet Slam, a portrait photographer. He lives between Paris and New-York, and he is a photographer specialized in beauty, music, fashion, he makes portraits sometimes provocative. He will tell us about his life, his career, and how he became a photographer.

programme.title: A special day
programme.desc: In this episode, we will spend a special day with Michaël Seksik, an illustration enthusiast. He has only a few hours left to finish hanging his exhibition of Prisunic posters, a flagship brand until the late 1980s. It is a collection that he is presenting to the public for the first time and we will accompany him in his preparations.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux legendes de la comedie britannique, Ronni Ancona et Jan Ravens, sont accompagnees des antiquaires Phil Serrell et James Braxton pour ce Road Trip. Partant de la ville de Redcar, dans le North Yorkshire, ils se dirigent vers une vente aux enchères à Stockport, dans le Cheshire.Jan se laisse emporter et depense tout son budget, tandis que Ronni se regale dune paire de bottes en verre très kitsch.Lors dun detour, Jan decouvre pourquoi les habitants de Hartlepool pensaient quun singe etait un Français, et Ronni reste bouche bee lorsque Braxton enlève ses vetements. Sacre moment !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Between 1883 and 1926 Claude Monet lived in a house at Giverny where he created a flower garden and a water garden, which provided the inspiration for his series of paintings known as the “Water Lilies”. The “Water-Lily Pond” portrays this garden, with its water lilies and the Japanese bridge in the background. In the series of eight large canvases on the theme, housed in the Musee de l’Orangerie in Paris, Monet introduces variations in light according to the hour of the day.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Le street Art s’est, depuis les annees 1980, glisse dans les villes et ses artistes s’octroient une place grandissante dans l’espace urbain, mais aussi dans les collections d’art. Installe à Lille, Jef Aerosol fait partie des historiques du Street Art français avec option pochoir. Son genre, c’est le portrait, et il a longtemps puise dans l’univers musical pour decliner sa passion. L’artiste est collectionne aujourd’hui par les plus grands amateurs de Street Art.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: The Galleria Umberto I, designed by Emanuele Rocco, stands as one of the last and grandest covered passages constructed in Europe. It serves as a poignant testament to the architectural brilliance of the 19th century.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Degas : une passion de la perfection
programme.desc: Exhibition on screen nous emmène à travers les rues de Paris puis au cœur d’une superbe exposition au Fitzwilliam Museum de Cambridge, dont l’impressionnante collection d’œuvres de Degas est la plus representative de Grande-Bretagne. Ayant beneficie d’un accès exclusif à une grande variete d’œuvres rares, le film raconte l’histoire fascinante de la quete de perfection de Degas à travers l’experimentation de nouvelles techniques et les leçons apprises en etudiant les grands maîtres.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: What is the Arab world? It is not easy to define this expression as it brings together territories as immense as they are diverse, cultures which share common traits but which each have their specificities. The Museum of the Institute of the Arab World endeavors to offer a vision of this world as rich as it is diverse, through numerous archaeological pieces, treasures of history and culture. But also, thanks to contemporary works, which help to tell what the Arab world is today, in a world shaken by cultural globalization and the questioning of the identities inherent in our modern society.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Japan-japanism, inspired objects, 1867-2018" at the decorative arts museum. Japan began to be known around the 1850s and its art was quickly recognized. In this exhibition you will be able to observe Japanese objects, but also objects of Japanese influence which testify to the relations between France and Japan.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In each episode of the decisive moment, we welcome a photographer whom we have asked to select three photos that have marked their life and their career. Whether they are reporters, portraitists or fashion photographers, they all have the same passion and will share it with us.

programme.title: Graffiti World
programme.desc: Graffiti World is a short program dedicated to contemporary urban art around the world. Each episode explores a specific city, highlighting iconic works of street art. Local soundscape accompanies the images for an authentic, commentary-free immersion. The program showcases the creativity and diversity of artistic expression in public spaces. An invitation to discover the richness of graffiti as an art form in its own right.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les animatrices vedettes Nicki Chapman et Jules Hudson sechappent à la campagne pour partir à la chasse aux antiquites avec Natasha Raskin et Phillip Serrell. Cest une bataille filles contre garçons, chaque equipe disposant de 400 £. Le voyage commence à Wormsley, dans le Herefordshire, puis les deux equipes se dirigent vers le pays de Galles et lOxfordshire, avant de finir à North Finchley, à Londres, pour une vente aux enchères.En chemin, les filles rencontrent un fabricant de sabots qui sculpte les chaussures à la main. Pendant ce temps, les garçons se rendent au Herefordshire Light Infantry Museum pour en apprendre davantage sur l’implication du regiment à Gallipoli.

programme.title: The Real Thing - Real Life in a Copycat World
programme.desc: Sixty Eiffel towers, a dozen of Great Pyramids of Giza, thirty leaning towers of Pisa, over eighty copies of the White House… Architecture doppelgangers are multiplying all over the world. Between lucrative investments, architectural piracy, and modern tourism, each of these places expresses an aspect of how our planet is being transformed through globalization. Do these places have something in common? How different are they from copies of the past? Are they more than just copies?

programme.title: Art Poster in Paris Streets
programme.desc: At the end of the 19th century, illustrated posters turned Paris into an open-air museum. From Cheret to Toulouse-Lautrec, artists and audiences met in the streets. This film explores this graphic revolution and its impact on society and modernity.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En 2013, la Norvège celebra le 150e anniversaire de la naissance dEdvard Munch (1863-1944), lune des figures proeminentes de lart moderne. Munch 150, coproduite par le Musee national et le Musee Munch, est dejà acclamee comme « lexposition dune vie ». Linteret general est enorme, comme le temoigne le resultat record de la mise aux enchères publiques de lun de ses quatre tableaux, Le Cri, soit 120 millions de dollars. Cette presentation vous amènera dans les coulisses de la mise en place de cette exposition, en plus de comprendre une visite guidee de la Norvège qui brossera la biographie de cet homme dont la vie sest etalee de la moitie du 19ème siècle jusquà loccupation allemande lors de la Seconde Guerre mondiale.

programme.title: Graffiti World
programme.desc: Graffiti World is a short program dedicated to contemporary urban art around the world. Each episode explores a specific city, highlighting iconic works of street art. Local soundscape accompanies the images for an authentic, commentary-free immersion. The program showcases the creativity and diversity of artistic expression in public spaces. An invitation to discover the richness of graffiti as an art form in its own right.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.sub-title: Nemausus 1, a low-income housing project from the 1980s
programme.desc: Nemausus 1, designed by Jean Nouvel in Nîmes during the 1980s, is a public housing project with bold lines resembling a modern ocean liner. Breaking away from the stereotypes of social housing, the building offers spacious, bright, and flexible living spaces aimed at improving residents quality of life. Nouvel used industrial materials such as steel and aluminum to give the structure a contemporary and durable aesthetic. The architecture of Nemausus 1 embodies a utopian vision, where social housing is synonymous with comfort and innovation. This project marked a turning point in public housing design in France.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: The man with the long greying beard who we find in this self-portrait is the painter Camille Pissarro (1830-1903). A keen follower of the Impressionist movement, the artist specialised in landscapes around Paris, often painted in winter, such as the “Chestnut Tress at Louveciennes” or the urban landscapes of Montmartre. Towards the end of his life, his painting technique changed and he turned towards Neo-Impressionism, for example in the “Seine River and Louvre Palace”.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Le rockeur progressif Rick Wakeman et son grand ami Ian Lavender, celèbre pour son rôle de Pike dans Dad’s Army, s’offrent une joyeuse viree sur les routes secondaires du Norfolk. Accompagnes des experts Raj Bisram et David Harper, ces deux chasseurs d’antiquites sillonnent le comte à la recherche de tresors à vendre aux enchères à Nottingham.Rick decouvre d’anciens graffitis medievaux caches dans la cathedrale de Norwich, tandis qu’Ian fait un detour vers le nord du Norfolk pour admirer la plus grande collection de soldats miniatures au monde.Mais un sage vieil homme japonais aidera-t-il Ian à triompher aux enchères ?

programme.title: We are Artists not Vandals
programme.desc: Follow the artists who dress the streets from the ground to the walls. In each episode, we will introduce you to one or several street artists who will make you discover their passion or their work for some. The street art is an artistic movement and a mode of expression, which asserts itself or claims so from the end of the 20th century. However, some people still find it difficult to consider it as a real art form. We will try to prove them wrong.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Spanish painter, Francisco de Goya. You will discover his labour with Lunch in the Countryside, The third of may 1808 or the Cannibals.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Flemish painter, Pierre Paul Rubens. You will discover his labour with Samson and Dalilah, The four philosophers or The education of Marie de’Medici.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les chefs televises Aldo Zilli et Ching He-Huang s’affrontent lors de ce Road Trip à travers le sud-est de l’Angleterre, accompagnes des experts Natasha Raskin et Paul Laidlaw.Aldo mise sur une bague en or malgre les conseils des experts, tandis que Ching espère que des antiquites d’origine orientale feront un beau score aux enchères dans le nord de Londres.En chemin, Aldo fait une halte pour rencontrer Jill, une doyenne de 200 ans qui fournissait autrefois la population en farine. De son côte, l’amoureuse des animaux Ching decouvre l’histoire d’un homme qui, au XIXe siècle, a risque le ridicule et la ruine pour proteger le betail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: With his considerable production of more than 6,000 works, Auguste Renoir took part in the emergence of the impressionist movement even if he were to distance himself from it later to assert a more personal style. This visit begins with his most famous masterpiece, the “Ball at the Moulin de la Galette”. You will also rediscover the “Dance in the City” and the “Piano Lesson” exposed at the Joslyn art museum as well as “Claude Renoir in Clown Costume”, a portrait of his son who was later to become one of France’s greatest film directors exposed at the Orangerie Museum in France Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Wim Delvoye" at the Royal Museum of Fine Arts of Belgium in Brussels. This exhibition tries to represent the works of the artist Wim Delvoye as well as possible. You will be able to observe emblematic works of the artist such as "the tattooed pig".

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: David Hockney à la Royal Academy of Arts
programme.desc: David Hockney, generalement considere comme l’un des artistes britanniques les plus populaires, connaît un succès mondial grâce à ses expositions à Londres, New York, Paris et ailleurs qui attirent des millions de spectateurs. Devenu recemment octogenaire, Hockney ne semble pas avoir l’intention de lever le pied ni de perdre son audace legendaire. Ce film revèle des interviews intimes et inedites et se concentre sur deux expositions à succès ayant eu lieu en 2012 et 2016 à la Royal Academy of Arts Londres. Le realisateur Phil Grabsky a beneficie d’un accès privilegie pour celebrer sur grand ecran ce genie creatif du XXIe siècle.

programme.title: The Real Thing - Real Life in a Copycat World
programme.desc: Sixty Eiffel towers, a dozen of Great Pyramids of Giza, thirty leaning towers of Pisa, over eighty copies of the White House… Architecture doppelgangers are multiplying all over the world. Between lucrative investments, architectural piracy, and modern tourism, each of these places expresses an aspect of how our planet is being transformed through globalization. Do these places have something in common? How different are they from copies of the past? Are they more than just copies?

programme.title: Art Poster in Paris Streets
programme.desc: At the end of the 19th century, illustrated posters turned Paris into an open-air museum. From Cheret to Toulouse-Lautrec, artists and audiences met in the streets. This film explores this graphic revolution and its impact on society and modernity.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will meet Bernard Matussière, fashion and art photographer. He has photographed the biggest stars and made memorable advertising campaigns that have marked a generation. He started photography at a very young age, and today he will tell us what made him become a photographer, his life, his career.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: Lissa Rivera is a Brooklyn-based photographer whose work has received numerous awards and accolades and has been exhibited internationally. Lissas latest project looks at photographys connection to identity on a personal level, focusing on her domestic partner as her muse. Rivera was chosen as a "Woman to Watch" for the biennial exhibition at the National Museum of Women in the Arts.

programme.title: A special day
programme.desc: In this episode, we will find Remy Pagart in his warehouse in Lille. This artist will be one of the 120 exhibitors of « Expo4Art », a contemporary art fair. We will follow him throughout this particular day and we will accompany him in his preparations for this event which is important for him and many other artists.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Licône de la pop et actrice Claire Grogan retrouve son compatriote de Glasgow, l’acteur Alex Norton de Taggart, pour une quete de tresors antiques lucratifs. Anita Manning et Paul Laidlaw sont là pour leur prodiguer leurs conseils d’experts.Anita et Alex se retrouvent embarques dans un Boat Trip dantiquites, evoquant leurs souvenirs denfance sur le Clyde. Pendant ce temps, Claire et Paul decouvrent de près à quoi ressemblait le château de Stirling au XVIe siècle.Le resultat de la vente aux enchères à Ayr dependra d’une dame nue.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: A key artist of the Italian Renaissance, Raffaello Santi (1483-1520) developed a classical art form, based on drawing, which made him the model for many painters in the following centuries. His favourite theme was the Madonna: you can admire, for example, “The Sistine Madonna” in Dresden and the “The Virgin and Child with St John the Baptist” in the Louvre. Notice the gentle harmony and the delicate sensuality in “The Three Graces” or the powerful human presence in “The Portrait of Baldassare Castiglione”.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: LÉcole darchitecture de Porto, conçue par Álvaro Siza, reflète son approche minimaliste et respectueuse du contexte environnant. Inauguree en 1993, lecole sintègre harmonieusement dans le paysage, jouant sur des volumes simples et une lumière naturelle omnipresente. Siza a utilise des materiaux modestes comme le beton blanc, conferant à lensemble une sobriete elegante. Les espaces sont conçus pour encourager linteraction entre les etudiants et les enseignants, favorisant ainsi un environnement dapprentissage ouvert et fluide. Ce bâtiment incarne parfaitement la philosophie architecturale de Siza, où fonction et poesie se rencontrent.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Pablo Picasso est l’un des plus grands artistes au monde, et jusqu’à sa mort en 1973, il etait le plus prolifique. Comment tout a commence ? Comment s’est construit Picasso ? Après avoir ete trop longtemps ignorees, il est temps de se concentrer sur les jeunes annees de l’artiste et son education qui lui ont permis d’accomplir l’extraordinaire. Trois villes ont joue un rôle-cle : Malaga, Barcelone et Paris. "Le jeune Picasso" les traverse et explore leur influence sur l’artiste, en analysant des œuvres specifiques de ses debuts.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: The city of Boulogne Billancourt experienced rapid development in the interwar period. Industrialists, filmmakers, architects, painters and sculptors test their creativity there. It is this impetus that the Museum of the 1930s would have liked to transcribe, created a collection of works of art from this period, first constituted by purchases in galleries, flea markets or auction houses, then mainly by donations. More than 1,500 sculptures, 800 paintings, 300 pieces of furniture… A heterogeneous whole, testimony of an era and a place in which the artistic excitement unfolds, and opens the way to a number of creative adventures of the 20th century.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.sub-title: Giacometti, between tradition and avant-garde at the Musee Maillol
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to the discovery of the exhibition "Giacometti, between tradition and avant-garde" at the Musee Maillol. This exhibition shows how Giacometti evolved from style to style. It tells his story from the first busts he sculpted at the age of 13, to the realization of large-scale sculptures towards the end of his life.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discuss with Spencer Tunick, an American visual photographer. He is known for his photographic compositions featuring hundreds of volunteers, men and women, posing nude, mostly in urban settings. He does not define himself as a photographer, but as a creator of installations, the photos being only the representation of his works.

programme.title: Graffiti World
programme.desc: Graffiti World is a short program dedicated to contemporary urban art around the world. Each episode explores a specific city, highlighting iconic works of street art. An invitation to discover the richness of graffiti as an art form in its own right.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux stars des annees 70, le crooner cool Tony Christie et la royaute pop Jimmy Osmond, sont accompagnes des experts Catherine Southon et Margie Cooper. Partant de la ville de Loughborough, dans le Leicestershire, ils se dirigent vers une vente aux enchères à Stoke-on-Trent, dans le Staffordshire.Tony profite dune visite à Coalbrookdale, le lieu où des techniques innovantes ont ete developpees, marquant le debut de la revolution industrielle. De son côte, le passionne de voitures Jimmy soffre un tour sur le circuit historique de Donington.La grande finale aux enchères comprend un moment de chant en groupe unique en son genre. Mais quel maestro musical remportera la victoire ?

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: There are few artists who, during their lifetime, prepare the posterity of their work with meticulousness, secrecy and determination. The symbolist painter Gustave Moreau, born in 1826, is one of them. In this museum that he created with his hand, his paintings are available to us, more than a century after his death, and tell us the story of a tormented and enigmatic man, borrowed from a mysticism that will one of the most important painters of the Symbolist movement.

programme.title: Museum stories
programme.desc: The Museum of Hunting and Nature in Paris opens the doors of the imagination of our forests, our jungles, our savannah, and offers a very special experience, to the discovery of animals, and of the relationship, sometimes tragic, sometimes sublime, that we have with them. It is an ode to nature, elevated to the rank of art, and to its wild, simple, ferocious beauty.

programme.title: Le Rendez-vous du dimanche
programme.desc: On the first Sunday of each month, Museum TV focuses on an artist, a work of art, or an artistic movement. In March, we celebrate women in art!

programme.title: Vasarely, the illusionist
programme.desc: As a visual artist, painter and theorist, Vasarely was determined to challenge the art of the easel and develop an art form that was "in tune with the times" and aimed at the widest possible audience. In his quest for "functional" art, he wanted his new kinetic plastic art to help beautify the city and thereby transform society. Today, he remains the celebrated inventor of Op art.

programme.title: Graffiti World
programme.desc: Graffiti World is a short program dedicated to contemporary urban art around the world. Each episode explores a specific city, highlighting iconic works of street art. Local soundscape accompanies the images for an authentic, commentary-free immersion. The program showcases the creativity and diversity of artistic expression in public spaces. An invitation to discover the richness of graffiti as an art form in its own right.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.sub-title: Charlety, a stadium in the city
programme.desc: Decouvrez un bâtiment de l’architecture classique, moderne ou contemporaine avec une « leçons d’architecture » conjuguant rigueur, plaisir et intelligence. Au stade Charlety, les architectes ont reussi à concilier les contraires : la grandeur monumentale du stade avec celle du quartier, la vie d’une cite sportive avec celle des bureaux. Situe à la porte de Gentilly à Paris, coince entre le peripherique et le boulevard des Marechaux, le stade Charlety est borde des pavillons de la Cite universitaire, d’un cimetière et de HLM en briques rouges. Sur ce site difficile de huit hectares, marque par les cinquante ans d’histoire de l’ancien stade Sebastien-Charlety, Henri Gaudin et son fils Bruno ont su implanter le volume massif d’un stade de 20 000 places couvertes, ainsi que les equipements sportifs et les bureaux commandes par la Ville de Paris. En concevant ce grand stade avec sa forme d’anneau gigantesque, ses gradins en ellipse et sa toiture aerienne, les architectes ont su traduire l’e.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this series is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Cree à la fin du XIXe siècle par le collectionneur Richard Wallace, ce musee prive de Londres conserve une très belle collection de peintures europeennes. On peut entre autres y admirer Le cavalier riant de Frans Hals ou le Portrait de Titus, le fils de Rembrandt. La peinture française du XVIIIe siècle dans sa veine galante et rococo y est particulièrement bien representee avec, bien sûr, le chef-d’œuvre de la peinture libertine de Fragonard, Les hasards heureux de l’escarpolette.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor and charmer Nigel Havers and his canny, deal-making chum (and ex-agent) Michael Whitehall explore the West Country. Travelling by Bentley and TVR, they’ll have £400 each and expert advice from Margie Cooper and James Braxton. But what will do best at the auction... Nigel’s old cockle bucket or Michael’s tambourine? Plus there’s a trip to see some Bristol Savages and bit of Georgian elegance with the story of ‘The King of Bath’.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop

Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Édouard Vuillard. You will discover his labour with Sleep, The Piano or Portrait de madame Henri Vaquez.

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: Its final time as the competition reaches its climax with just two pairs of professional garden designers remaining. It’s a battle of the relative new kids on the block as Millie Souter and Max Parker-Smith take on Tamara Bridge and Kate Savill. Both pairs wowed the judges with their designs and planting in the previous round but now they take on their toughest challenge yet as they compete for the crown. They have to create show gardens at one of the World’s greatest gardens, RHS Wisley Gardens in Surrey, for a budget of £10,000. With a brief set by the gardens curator they’ll need to take their designs to the next level if their want to win, and they’ve only got 48 hours to complete them. Adding to the pressure the weather is also against them.

Cardio exercises are included to raise the heart rate and boost endurance. All in a motivating atmosphere—ideal for an energy boost from the comfort of home!

programme.desc: Yoga instructor demonstrates powerful strengthening, revitalizing, relaxing and restorative exercises to provide a daily workout for any level of experience to open body and mind, build strength, stretch muscles and stimulate vibrant health.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: In this episode of Home Training, the team invites you to a 100% chair-based session! Sabrina leads you through gentle but effective exercises that activate the whole body. Starting seated with a full warm-up, you’ll flow through varied moves — all with a chair. The vibe is light, friendly, and fun, making it easy to stay motivated. It’s the perfect routine for all levels, even in small spaces.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: We are in the middle of the harvest season, a perfect opportunity to discover the most beautiful French vineyards.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Prana Flow: Open Your Shoulders and Hips
programme.desc: This vinyasa flow allows the practitioner to notice moments of stillness and transformation with every breath. Power and Prana calls for a constant presence of mind and steadiness of breath. It is in this state you learn when to stabilize and when to let go.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourdhui cest sur la route des champignons que Julie nous embarque. Rien de mieux pour occuper ses week-ends qu’une balade en foret à la recherche de champignons comestibles. Certaines espèces, comme le cèpe ou la girolle, se conservent très bien au congelateur ou, pour les plus patients, en bocaux. Nous aurons egalement loccasion de rencontrer deux Chefs passionnes par les champignons, devenus des specialistes du sujet : Franck Quinton et Regis Marcon. Mais pour l’instant on prend la route, à la decouverte de plats typiquement français avec d’etonnants champignons de Paris en Touraine, des morilles dans le Jura, des cèpes en Gironde, des russules charbonnières en Normandie et des coulemelles en Auvergne !

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Now its time to give it their all on the construction sites, in a bid to win the coveted title of decorating ace. And its Cedric whos going to take the plunge in this competition. At 38, this native of Namur is passionate about decoration. He talks decor, thinks decor, lives decor. Cedric shares his passion for decoration with his husband Mickaël, a partner who knows better than anyone how much of a perfectionist he is.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: On this second day, we meet up with Melissa, 30, originally from Montpellier. This administrative agent has been living in Montreal for five years. And decorating is in her blood. Its a heritage that Melissa hopes will prove to be an asset in the competition. Listening is all very well. But this week, its all about sticking to the theme “like a garden”. Will Melissa be this weeks ace decorator?

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: If youre a nature enthusiast and a fan of outdoor cooking, the upcoming season is perfect for barbecue enthusiasts! Our journey will take us to Aube, nestled in the heart of the Brevonnes forest, and then to the Massif des Bauges, where grilling and snow create a unique combination. Afterward, well explore the Libournais region, where well uncover cooking techniques that make use of vine shoots, which are plentiful in the area. Just a short distance from the vineyards, well arrive at another corner of Gironde, the Blaye region, where the cooking method remains consistent but features a distinctly local ingredient: eel.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes us down a different kind of yellow-brick road, one that tastes of childhood and gourmet delights: the road of sweets. France may be famous for its gastronomy, but its not to be outdone when it comes to pastries and confectionery - quite the opposite. “Betises” from Cambrai, "Berlingots” from Carpentras, "Calissons” from Aix-en-provence, every region in France has its own sweet or confectionery.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Lets hit the roads of France to discover shellfish. Well visit Brittany, then the Normandy coast where fishing is the regional sport, and Corsica, where the far northeast of the island lives to the rhythm of lobster. Julie takes us to cook lobster, crab with a very special recipe, and langoustines.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Leftovers often end up in the garbage can. But with a little thought, its easy to recycle them. This ecological and economical gesture can even delight our taste buds. Like us, Luana Belmondo hates throwing things away. She knows all about waste-free cooking and has mastered the art. She shows us how to reinvent boiled or steamed potatoes as something other than mashed potatoes. On the program: potato souffle with paprika and vegetable gratin with curry.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Honey was the first sweet condiment in history! It has also been known and consumed as a remedy since Antiquity. In France, we find an infinite variety of honey: acacia, chestnut, fir, rosemary, orange, spruce, oak, linden or lavender... Well cross forests, fields and even towns, as bees also forage in urbanized areas. Well then cook up emblematic recipes like Vercel gingerbread. Finally, well discover the European dark bee. Protecting this 80-million-year-old bee has become the spearhead of some passionate beekeepers.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: To better understand the role of these explosive mountains located all over the world, on land or under the sea, Yann Arthus-Bertrand goes to Italy, the country with the most active volcanoes in Europe. Accompanied by volcano expert Jacques-Marie Bardintzeff, the photographer meets those people who have chosen to live with « their » volcano, in spite of the dangers involved in this kind of proximity.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, were off to discover summer fruits, which are harvested from June to August: peaches, melons, strawberries, raspberries... Well then head to the cherry capital, Ceret, and cook blueberries, strawberries and an apricot charlotte.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: In this episode of Home Training, Guillaume and Sabrina guide you through a complete lower-body strengthening session. After a warm-up, they move on to targeted exercises for the thighs, abs, and glutes. Squats, lunges, and lateral raises are on the program to build strength and tone your body.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: This week, it is 80 kms from the capital, in Fontainebleau, that Julie is putting down her bags. Fontainebleau, a name famous throughout the world, a magical name which evokes for some a forest, for others a castle, a name which still shines with its royal history. The forest of Fontainebleau has inspired the art world since the beginning of the 19th century. Landscape painters such as Corot and Millet drew inspiration for their works there. But Fontainebleau has many other treasures in its bag, and gastronomy is part of its heritage. This is what Julie will discover through three recipes: Quail with grapes, raspberry and poppy pie and crayfish grave.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Stabilize and Center: Strengthen Your Core and Open Your Hips
programme.desc: Stabilize and Center allows for the creation of a deeper connection with your core, as well as the present moment. Through the practice of conscious breathing, movement and attention to the postures, a state of centered awareness can be cultivated.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes us on a journey of spices and aromatic plants. Spices are a call to travel, to faraway lands and to the unknown. On her journey, Julie will introduce us to the famous black pepper.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Lets hit the roads of France to discover shellfish. Well visit Brittany, then the Normandy coast where fishing is the regional sport, and Corsica, where the far northeast of the island lives to the rhythm of lobster. Julie takes us to cook lobster, crab with a very special recipe, and langoustines.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo and her pastry chef friend Laurent Favre-Mot prepare desserts from our childhood. On the program: panettone in French toast, and torta della nonna with lemon cream and pine nuts, a typical Italian dessert!

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous allons voyager au Mexique avec les fajitas ! Un plat typique de la cuisine tex-mex. On va preparer ensemble des tortillas (galettes de maïs). Et pour la suite, des fajitas avec du poulet, des poivrons et des epices.

programme.title: In the eyes of a champ
programme.desc: Martine Ek Hagen is a Norwegian cross-country skier. She was a member of the national team and the junior team for five years. Today, her professional career is over but she still loves to ski and challenge herself for fun. She has set herself a daunting challenge: to reproduce the incredible ski trek of 2 soldiers featured on a famous Norwegian painting.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: India - The Search for Mindfulness Part I
programme.desc: We journey to India, a land revered for its ancient spiritual wisdom and practices. From the tranquil valleys of Kullu Manali in the Himalayas to the vibrant, bustling streets of Delhi, we explore the multifaceted world of mindfulness, meditation, and yoga. As we navigate through contrasting environments, we discover how meditation is part of daily life, offering invaluable lessons about finding inner tranquility amid external chaos. We also delve into the transformative impact of mindfulness on underprivileged children, highlighting how these ancient practices empower young lives. Rooted in Indias rich cultural heritage, the episode reveals how the nations spiritual traditions provide both sanctuary and a deeper connection to ourselves and the broader world. Join us for this enlightening expedition as we unravel the power of mindfulness and how we can incorporate it into our daily lives no matter where we live.

programme.title: In the eyes of a champ
programme.desc: Meryl Delferriere is 23 years old and has been paragliding since the age of 12. She has won the world championships and the world cup final. For her, the pleasure of flying rhymes with freedom. The freedom to be somewhere else, in the air and to be able to clear her mind and just enjoy the moment. She will try to reproduce the first flight ever made from one of the highest peaks in the Pyrenees, culminating at almost 2,785m.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: New Zealand - The Blue Mind Part I
programme.desc: In this episode set in scenic New Zealand, we explore the deep-rooted question: Does being near or in water actually improve our health? Guided by Dr. Wallace J. Nichols, author of "The Blue Mind," we delve into the scientific and emotional benefits of water, exemplified by therapeutic surfing experiences and the Maori peoples ancestral connection to aquatic environments. From mental well-being to physical health, we uncover how New Zealands abundant waters serve as more than just a natural spectacle; they are a source of holistic health and well-being. Along the way, Dr. Nichols introduces the concept of a "bluescription," a personalized prescription for water-based activities, inviting viewers to tap into the transformative power of water in their own lives.

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: Its final time as the competition reaches its climax with just two pairs of professional garden designers remaining. It’s a battle of the relative new kids on the block as Millie Souter and Max Parker-Smith take on Tamara Bridge and Kate Savill. Adding to the pressure the weather is also against them.

They emphasize the importance of warming up properly to prevent injuries and maximize effort. The entire body is engaged, from legs to arms, with exercises designed for home workouts. Fun and accessible, this session is perfect for solo practice or a family workout.

Leave your conception perfect behind as you explore this awakening sequence.
